zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester於1040年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾朋吉德-利阿時，他的父親Amaury Arbitot45歲，母親Helisinda41歲。他於大約1064年與Adeliza Eunice Baalun在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特被列為constable of gloucester castle。他去世於1083年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年43歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特格盧斯特 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester于1040年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾朋吉德-利阿时，他的父亲Amaury Arbitot45岁，母亲Helisinda41岁。他于大约1064年与Adeliza Eunice Baalun在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特被列为constable of gloucester castle。他去世于1083年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年43岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特格盧斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester was born in 1040, in Pont-de-l'Arche, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Amaury Arbitot, was 45 and his mother, Helisinda, was 41. He married Adeliza Eunice Baalun about 1064, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as constable of gloucester castle in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England. He died in 1083, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester est né en 1040, à Pont-de-l'Arche, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Amaury Arbitot, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Helisinda, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza Eunice Baalun environ 1064, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable of gloucester castle à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1083, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester 1040 in Pont-de-l'Arche, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amaury Arbitot 45 und seine Mutter Helisinda 41. Er hat um 1064 in England Adeliza Eunice Baalun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als constable of gloucester castle in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1083 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester è nato il nel 1040 nel Pont-de-l'Arche, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Amaury Arbitot, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Helisinda, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Adeliza Eunice Baalun circa 1064, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable of gloucester castle nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England. Morì nel 1083, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucesterが1040年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアポント-デ-ル'アルチェで生まれた時，父Amaury Arbitotは45歳，母Helisindaは41歳であった。約1064年にイギリスでAdeliza Eunice Baalunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターでの職業はconstable of gloucester castleと記録されている。彼は1083年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで43歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターグロウセスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester(이)가 1040년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 폰트-데-'아르체에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amaury Arbitot(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Helisinda(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1064년 영국에서 Adeliza Eunice Baalun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 constable of gloucester castle이었다. 그는 1083년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터 그루스스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

mn.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: Gloucester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester nasceu em 1040, em Pont-de-l'Arche, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Amaury Arbitot, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Helisinda, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza Eunice Baalun aproximadamente 1064, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como constable of gloucester castle em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1083, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester родился в 1040 г. в местности понт-де-л'арч, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Amaury Arbitot было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Helisinda, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza Eunice Baalun около 1064 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии constable of gloucester castle в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер в 1083 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестир кэтедраль, глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester nació en 1040, en Pont-de-l'Arche, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Amaury Arbitot, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Helisinda, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Adeliza Eunice Baalun aproximadamente 1064, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era constable of gloucester castle en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1083, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
